### Post by Zill on 2013-03-28
Welcome to Ubuntu forums.

This is an English language forum.  If you wish to post questions in Arabic then I suggest you may receive more help from the Arabic forums.

Links to the Arabic forums are shown here: [Local language support]("http://www.ubuntu.com/support/community/local-language")

---

### Post by schragge on 2013-03-28
Some countries (e.g. [thread=2116231]Ethiopia[/thread]) block downloads of anything that has *proxy* in their name. Unfortunately, the package* libproxy1* falls into this category.

---
